fields.summary: Represents a four-byte OpenType/TrueType tag packed into a 32-bit unsigned integer.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFourByteTag` is a read-only struct that wraps a `uint` encoding four
ASCII characters as <c>(c1 << 24) | (c2 << 16) | (c3 << 8) | c4</c>.
This matches the OpenType/TrueType tag convention used for table identifiers,
feature tags, variation axis tags, and similar four-character codes.

Implicit conversions to and from `uint` are provided, and the struct is
interchangeable with `uint` in most SkiaSharp APIs that accept tags.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
// Construct from four characters
var wghtTag = new SKFourByteTag('w', 'g', 'h', 't');

// Parse from a string (pads or truncates to 4 characters)
var italTag = SKFourByteTag.Parse("ital");

// Round-trip to/from uint
uint raw = wghtTag;
SKFourByteTag back = raw;

Console.WriteLine(wghtTag.ToString()); // "wght"
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> struct from a packed 32-bit value.

params.value: The packed tag value, where the most-significant byte holds the first character.

entries.signature: public SKFourByteTag (char c1, char c2, char c3, char c4);

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> struct from four ASCII characters.

params.c4: The fourth (least-significant) character of the tag.
params.c2: The second character of the tag.
params.c3: The third character of the tag.
params.c1: The first (most-significant) character of the tag.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.other: The value to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both tags encode the same value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> with the same packed value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current instance.
fields.returns: The packed 32-bit tag value cast to <see cref="T:System.Int32" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag left, SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag right);

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> instances are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> encode the same value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static implicit operator uint (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag tag);

fields.summary: Implicitly converts a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> to its packed <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representation.
fields.returns: The packed 32-bit value of the tag.

entries.signature: public static implicit operator SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag (uint tag);

fields.summary: Implicitly converts a packed <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> value to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" />.

params.tag: The packed 32-bit tag value to convert.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag left, SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag right);

fields.summary: Returns a value indicating whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> instances are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> encode different values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Parses a string into an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" />, padding with spaces or truncating to exactly four characters.

params.tag: The string to parse. If <see langword="null" /> or empty, the returned tag encodes zero.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> representing the first four characters of <paramref name="tag" />, padded with spaces if shorter.

fields.summary: Returns the string representation of this tag as four ASCII characters.
fields.returns: A four-character string decoded from the packed tag value.
